# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

FROM alpine:latest as base

RUN apk --no-cache add ca-certificates curl openrc openssl jq \
    && rm -rf /var/cache/apk/*

ENV DB_PASSWORD=mysecretpassword

ARG WEB_IMAGE=webserver:latest
ARG API_IMAGE=api:latest
ARG DATABASE_IMAGE=postgres:latest
ARG REDIS_IMAGE=redis:latest

FROM $base as builder

COPY . /app
WORKDIR /app

RUN apk --no-cache add git && \
    git clone https://github.com/your/repo.git . && \
    CMD ["make", "build"]

FROM alpine:latest

ARG WEB_IMAGE
ARG API_IMAGE
ARG DATABASE_IMAGE
ARG REDIS_IMAGE

FROM $base as web
COPY --from=builder /app .
RUN apk --no-cache add $WEB_IMAGE && \
    rm -rf /var/cache/apk/*
EXPOSE 80

FROM $base as api
COPY --from=builder /app .
RUN apk --no-cache add $API_IMAGE && \
    rm -rf /var/cache/apk/*
EXPOSE 8080

FROM $base as database
COPY --from=builder /app .
ENV POSTGRES_PASSWORD=$DB_PASSWORD
RUN apk --no-cache add $DATABASE_IMAGE && \
    rm -rf /var/cache/apk/*
EXPOSE 5432

FROM $base as redis
COPY --from=builder /app .
RUN apk --no-cache add $REDIS_IMAGE && \
    rm -rf /var/cache/apk/*
EXPOSE 6379
